title: logo The New Order: World Collided | Spector
description: This is a origin that was put into The New Order: World Collided
body: This mod is a add-on to the Origins mod. this was made and created by me solely, I made this for The New Order: Worlds Collided modpack and now it can be added to your own modpacks and worlds. the origin specter is a being at uses energy as it's main weapon but with such great buffs there has to be some downsides like not being able to go to the nether and being low hearted
